weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 64 total findings, with 11 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-20230, which was observed twice. The most active day was June 25, 2026, with various security domains impacted, including AI/ML threats, cloud/IAM, and crypto libraries. Notable CVEs seen during this period include CVE-2026-57914, CVE-2026-57915, and CVE-2026-13426, among others, affecting areas such as containers, identity/authentication, and OS/kernel. These findings highlight the diverse range of vulnerabilities and security domains that require ongoing monitoring and mitigation.
